items.claim: Saiged Izaev thrives in clinch situations and uses takedowns well.
items.quote: this is a guy that really thrives in clinch situations. We saw in that Dobby fight, we saw a lot of takedowns

items.claim: Saiged Izaev slowed down in the back half of his fight against Nicholas Dalby due to cardio issues.
items.quote: Syd that back half of that fight he really started to slow down and that's where Nicholas Dobby started to pick up momentum.

items.claim: Abu Bakar Vagaev trains with Khamzat Chimaev.
items.quote: Vagv, this is a guy trains with Hamzach Chamay

items.claim: Abu Bakar Vagaev has dynamic layers to his striking game, including spinning attacks off low kicks.
items.quote: He's got really really good spinning attacks. I like what I saw where he would throw the low kick and as he's retracting the low kick, we're seeing him spin through and throw these spinning wheel kicks.

items.claim: Abu Bakar Vagaev has very good takedowns, including single legs and crackdowns.
items.quote: And he's got very, very good takedowns as well. I saw a lot of single legs. I saw a lot of head outside singles, a lot of crackdowns.
